mandatory_clauses.description: Full names, addresses, and KvK (Chamber of Commerce) numbers of both parties
Clear description of the services or deliverables to be provided
Agreed hourly/project rate and payment schedule (with VAT treatment)
Contract duration or project completion criterion
Who owns the intellectual property created during the engagement

Clause confirming independent contractor status (no employment relationship). Note: DBA (Deregulering Beoordeling Arbeidsrelaties) requires a genuine absence of an employment relationship — tax authorities can reclassify the arrangement if the work resembles employment.
